programme.title: E5 - Avalanche Control
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas explore Rogers Pass, a favorite among Rocky Mountain skiers. They also learn about avalanche control techniques required to make this once-inaccessible area safe.

programme.title: E4 - So Ugly
programme.desc: Christian welcomes actor Marc-Andre Grondin, writer Chrystine Brouillet, and chef Jean-Michel Leblond to cook foods considered 'unappetizing.' From offal to snails, they explore unusual flavors.

programme.title: E16 - Lucille Boitelle/Gabriela Hearst/Mathieu Casseau
programme.desc: In the heart of Lyon, the Musee des Beaux-Arts houses 90,000 works of art. Lucille Boitelle is an ornamental painter who creates worlds that embellish any surface. Sensual and ethereal: the show by Uruguayan designer Gabriela Hearst. In Douarnenez, ceramist Mathieu Casseau handles clay with vigour and gentleness.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Arts24
programme.desc: Culture news from the world's art, food, and fashion capital, Paris, bringing you the latest trends, exhibitions, culinary innovations, and style movements that continue to shape global taste and creativity.

programme.title: TÊTe à TÊTe
programme.desc: Tête à Tête is an interview-based program on France 24 that features in-depth conversations with influential figures from politics, culture, and business. Each episode provides personal insights, expert opinions, and behind-the-scenes perspectives on current events and global issues.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: E5 - Earth Week Wildlife Wonders
programme.desc: Discover Earth Week wildlife wonders with Blippi! He meets Jabari the lion to learn how to roar & sneak in the savannah. Then, the BlippiMobile goes underwater to communicate with dolphins & get an ocean tour from a jellyfish! The wild adventures continue as Blippi meets a panda in the rainforest, jumps with a kangaroo in Australia & learns how bees make honey inside a hive!

programme.title: E3 - Earth Week: Saving The Planet
programme.desc: Let's save the planet with Lellobee City Farm! Ella, Mei & Rishi clean up the pond to make a happy home for the animals. Then, they sing a song about recycling trash! The Earth Week fun continues as they demonstrate litter picking & composting. Plus, learn about bumblebees, make a home for a hedgehog & watch the beautiful nocturnal animals come out at night!

programme.title: E2 - When Cute Creatures Cause Big Chaos!
programme.desc: Watch out, because these cute creatures are causing big chaos! First, Chroma the Magic Pet has a cold, & every time she sneezes, she causes a huge color splat! Mila & Morphle must find her before the whole city is covered in color. Then, the Baby Morphles arrive from another dimension & they are in the mood for a game of chase! From a giant living doll to a runaway magic pet, these cute creatures are causing chaos everywhere!

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo & Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum & they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: E3 - Sky High & Super Fun Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready for sky-high & super fun adventures with JJ & his friends! First, Astronauts JJ & Mimi blast off into space, soaring past stars & planets before landing on the moon for a cheesy snack! When Boba loses his special balloon, the friends set off in a hot air balloon craft for a chase of a lifetime. The action continues as JJ & Wally train to be firefighters, but Wally's goofing around turns him into the one who needs saving!

programme.title: E1 - Teamwork Makes the Dream Work!
programme.desc: Buster is learning that teamwork makes the dream work! During a big soccer match, Buster is very competitive, but he learns the value of being a team player to help his team win the game. Then, when he & his friend Scout get lost in a big hedge maze, they find that they have to work together to find their way out. From cleaning up toys to helping a friend who is stuck in the mud, teamwork always saves the day!

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Clubhouse Game Day
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate clubhouse game day with JJ & his friends! The competition heats up as JJ & Wally compete in an adrenaline-pumping go-kart race full of fun tricks & obstacles. Then, it's time for a silly game of hide-and-seek, where Boba finds the most clever hiding places! The games continue with a balloon boat race, a round of Duck Duck Goose & a clean-up dance party after the clubhouse gets messy. It's a day packed with fun & friendly competition!

programme.title: E1 - Teamwork Makes the Dream Work!
programme.desc: Buster is learning that teamwork makes the dream work! During a big soccer match, Buster is very competitive, but he learns the value of being a team player to help his team win the game. Then, when he & his friend Scout get lost in a big hedge maze, they find that they have to work together to find their way out. From cleaning up toys to helping a friend who is stuck in the mud, teamwork always saves the day!

The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: Clownfish and White Tiger
programme.desc: We follow the aquarium team as they initiate their very own breeding program with the hope of finding many more clownfish to come. In the meantime, Lin Mao, the white tiger, has something wrong with his hip and the vets need to make a diagnosis.

programme.title: Knights
programme.desc: Little Lewis follows every step in order to achieve his dream. After completing a plethora of thankless tasks at a young age, he moves on to the rank of ‘squire.' A chance to demonstrate his bravery on the battlefield, in order to be knighted, at last.

programme.title: Day of the Competition
programme.desc: After watching the show 'Officially Amazing', Ricky and Gav rediscover their competitive streak by trying to break various records and challenges that get increasingly silly. Makes include a shuffle puzzle inspired by L.S. Lowry and a 'putt a poo' golf game.

programme.title: The Legendary Ironfan
programme.desc: Regal Academy faces Shan Academy in a track-and-field competition. Hawk, Travis, and Astoria are beaten by LingLing, Princess IronFan's granddaughter. Rose must find LingLing's weakness: a love of frilly dresses, to save the day.

programme.title: Knights
programme.desc: Little Lewis follows every step in order to achieve his dream. After completing a plethora of thankless tasks at a young age, he moves on to the rank of ‘squire.' A chance to demonstrate his bravery on the battlefield, in order to be knighted, at last.

programme.title: Banquet
programme.desc: Howler and Dove are invited to Lord Roach's banquet. But banquets come with all kinds of rules and regulations, exposing the greedier guests in the room! Hardened foodies, they indulge in all kinds of scheming.

programme.title: Tension and Chemical Kinetics
programme.desc: What exactly is surface tension? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of materials science. Have hands-on fun by experimenting with liquid detergent, and get to know Yuan T. Lee, a chemist, known for his advances in kinetics of chemical reactions.

programme.title: Bird Kite
programme.desc: What makes a kite stay in the sky? We'll explain all with this playful paper poultry!

programme.title: Bio-dome
programme.desc: Searching for some inspiring ideas, the team seals itself in a Cold War-era Mars habitat. But when a serious malfunction occurs, the team must work together to solve it. Meanwhile, Zeke, locked out of the dome, spends a lot of quality time with the family, Max's family.

programme.title: The Magician (Steven Frayne) and The Captain (Kate Richardson-Walsh)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, the 'Undisputed King of Magic' Steven Frayne (aka Dynamo) and Olympic gold medallist hockey captain Kate Richardson-Walsh share their insights on success.

programme.title: Are You Drinking Enough Water?
programme.desc: The doctors explain how your urine can tell you if you've drunk enough water. Dr. Chris looks at how snake venom can damage the body. In the emergency room, one patient has banged his head on some railings, and another has a huge black eye.

programme.title: Bernoulli and Company
programme.desc: Eric learns how the Bernoulli Principle and playing with the flow of air can help him inflate a plastic bag. This same principle explains how airplanes fly, too.

programme.title: Sickness Strikes
programme.desc: Liam is feeling very sick. Can he hold it down long enough to impress the coach with his shooting skills? Ice dancer Ella reveals just how much skating means to her. And disaster strikes for captain Emily when she falls on an already injured shoulder.

programme.title: Clownfish and White Tiger

programme.title: Darwin's Big Air!
programme.desc: Darwin wants to get big air on his BMX bike, so Heni and Newts help him practice!

programme.title: Kite Shenanigans
programme.desc: Eric builds a new kite. He makes sure it is symmetrical – both sides are exactly the same – as that helps kites fly and stay balanced in the air. He learns that there are lots of different types of kites but they all need the wind to fly.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... a Bee
programme.desc: Henry meets a worker bee, outside its hive in a wildlife park. Henry becomes a Bee, flies around collects lots of nectar.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries of the Solar System
programme.desc: Even though spacecraft have been sent to every planet in our solar system, many mysteries remain. Host Emily Calandrelli searches for answers to celestial mysteries that stump even our brightest scientists.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: The story of the Kumbh Mela, the festival estimated to gather 400 million people over 45 days. As Hindus make the pilgrimage to bathe at the riverbank, tragedy strikes on the holiest day of the event.

programme.title: E1 - Germany And Austria
programme.desc: Joanna's emotional exploration begins at the river's source, Germany's Black Forest mountains, ends at the Romanian/Ukrainian border, and marks two key anniversaries. The first is D-Day - the beginning of the end of World War Two and a brief era of freedom.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Cyril encounters a surfer who survived a bull shark attack; he fishes South Africa's murky waters at sunset, hoping to avoid falling prey to a predator.

programme.title: E3 - Jaguar
programme.desc: Biologist Patrick Aryee is in Costa Rica to witness the annual mass nesting of sea turtles, as well as the predatory jaguars that come in for the kill.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: E11 - The Greatest
programme.desc: Top Chef can't go to Kentucky without taking a turn at fried chicken. Chef Art Smith guests judges a secret herbs and spices blind taste test ahead of the Quickfire fry-off. After the finger licking goodness, the Chefs turn their attention to another Kentucky legend, the Louisville Lip, boxer and philanthropist Muhammad Ali. Using his memorable fights as inspiration, the Chefs must make a progressive meal for a charity benefit at the Muhammad Ali Center for donors, the judges, and special guest Laila Ali.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: E1 - The Glasgow Poisoning
programme.desc: When police discover a young man's body in a Glasgow bedsit, their investigation reveals he died by arsenic poisoning. Was it murder or suicide?

programme.title: E24 - Wagon Ride
programme.desc: Bluey can't wait to get to the monkey bars as Dad takes her and Bingo on a wagon ride to the park. But her patience is tested when Dad keeps stopping to chat with other grown-ups.

programme.title: E25 - Taxi
programme.desc: Bluey is running a taxi service. Her first passenger is Businessman Dad, who is in a rush to get to the airport. But with unexpected delays, Dad's in danger of missing his flight!

programme.title: E11 - Spooky Day
programme.desc: Supertato runs in fright when Pumpkin tries to make friends with him, but later realises she needs his help as she's stuck in the air hanging from balloons set up by Evil Pea.

programme.title: E14 - Bullet Train, Japan
programme.desc: All aboard for a high-speed adventure, as the Go Jetters visit Japan's Bullet Train.

programme.title: E15 - Go Jet Academy: Wind Power
programme.desc: The team race to save Glitch when his kite flies too close to the academy's windfarm.

programme.title: E8 - The Pirate Inspector
programme.desc: A mysterious Pirate Inspector is coming to visit Captain Captain and the pirates. If they fail the inspection, they will get a huge fine. But they soon suspect the Inspector is someone they know!

programme.title: E21 - Craft Book
programme.desc: Lily finds a flight-themed book that has instructions on how to make simple aircrafts.

programme.title: E12 - Sticky Gecko
programme.desc: Mum must get Bluey and Bingo out the door in time for a playdate, but they can't leave before they finish their game - waiting for a sticky rubber gecko to drop from the ceiling.

programme.title: E8 - The Monster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: E10 - The Metal Detector Badge
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: E3 - Frog Song
programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.title: E23 - Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: E24 - Faceytalk
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: E94 - Day Trip
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go on a day trip to the Hidey Hup. They take turns on The Tubby Bouncy, The Tubby Slidey and The Tubby Spinny before they go on The Tubby Uppy Downy together.

programme.title: E23 - Comet
programme.desc: Messy has to save OKIDO from a falling comet before his bedtime! He sees that Mayor Oki still has his bath!

programme.title: E19 - It's Time For A Sleepover
programme.desc: JoJo has a sleepover at Gran Gran's but is confused when bedtime comes while it's still light outside! Gran Gran creates their own starry sky for JoJo.

programme.title: E32 - Beach Break
programme.desc: Sarah & Duck are spending a day at the beach, aiming to build some sand animals.

programme.desc: The Bubble Man is in town so a visit to the Big Shop is in order for Sarah, Duck and Donkey.

programme.desc: Everyone in OKIDO is feeling very tired. Messy tries to help by adding extra superbeans to Farmer Fuddle's new recipe, but now everyone has far too much energy! How can Messy help them burn it off?

programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E97
programme.desc: Roshni stands firmly with her husband Raj as he chases his IAS dream. But when his betrayal breaks her trust, her life changes forever. Will she rebuild herself and fight back stronger than ever?

programme.title: E620
programme.desc: Anjali Awasthi, a young and principled lawyer, stands tall against legal corruption and social injustice, determined to uncover truth and defend the innocent, no matter the cost.

programme.title: E5144
programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.title: E2000
programme.desc: Anupamaa sacrifices her ambitions for family, feeling uncredited. She finds empowerment by living on her terms after trials, showcasing a dramatic journey of resilience and independence.

programme.title: E209 - The Girl Who Cried Danger
programme.desc: Volt and ShoutOut hatch a plan to stop their super-clinger fan from making false alarm emergency calls.

programme.title: E310 - Student Driver Survivor
programme.desc: When a competitor threatens to shut down Mrs. Puff's boating school, she must rely on SpongeBob to stay in business.

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E609 - The Last Laugh / Driver's Dread
programme.desc: Luan thinks Mr. Coconuts is out for revenge when she replaces him with Lola in her act. // Hoping to drive out to the outlets to meet Lori, Leni ooks for alternative ways to get her driver's license.

programme.title: E262 - A Cabin in the Kelp / The Hankering
programme.desc: The Gal Pals take Pearl to a cabin in the woods for a weekend of silly pranks. // Mr. Krabs has a secret taste for something surprising.

programme.title: E303 - Scream Machine
programme.desc: When Charlotte's invention for The Gizmo Show is accidentally destroyed and then rebuilt, Charlotte worries that the attention she gets could expose Kid Danger and Captain Man’s secret identity.

programme.title: E126 - Bubble Bass Reviews / Patrick's Prison Pals
programme.desc: Bubble Bass reviews The Patrick Show. // Bunny brings Patrick to prison for 'Bring Your Kid To Work Day'.

programme.title: E212 - Attack of The Clones
programme.desc: When Danger Force leaves for an out-of-town mission, Ray calls on the Danger Force Clones for help. He quickly realizes that even though the clones look just like their superhero counterparts, they are very, very different.

programme.title: E204 - Mutiny on the Krusty / The Whole Tooth
programme.desc: When a storm sweeps the Krusty Krab away, its crew and customers will need a crazed Krabs to lead them back home. // Patrick’s last baby tooth needs to come out, but he’s afraid to let it go.

programme.title: E205 - Just a Little Pipe Problem / Camp Chuck
programme.desc: The Groom & Board gets a surprise inspection, but the broken pipe Jack and Lil neglected to fix might ruin them all. // Chuck's got a new hustle: theatre camp! Jack & Lil are sure it's a scam. But there's more to the chaotic show than they realized.

programme.title: E207 - iHurt Lewbert
programme.desc: A 'Messing With Lewbert' sketch goes horribly awry, injuring Carly’s obnoxious doorman. The gang nurses him back to health until Freddie’s mother steps in and takes over. When a romance starts to blossom they have to stop it.

programme.title: E219 - Lay Lay's Little Little
programme.desc: Sadie and Lay Lay are assigned a shared Little Buddy, Milaena, they spend the week attempting to create a mini-Sadie and mini-Lay Lay, or 'Say Lay', instead of learning about what Milaena likes and what makes her unique.

programme.title: E311 - Wiener Takes All / Stuck in an Elevator
programme.desc: Tired of doing grunt work at the Krusty Krab, Squidward takes a new job as Manager of Weenie Hut Jr's. // Squidward gets trapped in an elevator with SpongeBob and Patrick on his way to return a nearly overdue library book.

programme.title: E205 - Just a Little Pipe Problem / Camp Chuck
programme.desc: The Groom & Board gets a surprise inspection, but the broken pipe Jack and Lil neglected to fix might ruin them all. // Chuck's got a new hustle: theatre camp! Jack & Lil are sure it's a scam. But there's more to the chaotic show than they realized.

programme.title: E196 - The Fishbowl / Married to Money
programme.desc: Sandy tries to study SpongeBob and Patrick’s behavior, but her science experiment goes horribly awry. // Mr. Krabs takes Plankton’s advice, and finally marries the only thing he ever loved…money!

programme.title: E219 - Lay Lay's Little Little

programme.title: E4 - Black Swans - Black Swans (Part 4) Countdown To Doomsday
programme.desc: During the Cold War, it was a very real fear that a nuclear winter would obliterate life as we know it. In 2026 the sense of dread has been replaced by the threat of climate change. So are we destined to feel doomed? (Part 4)

programme.title: E4 - Spies In The Outback - The Spy Who Loved Alice
programme.desc: The Cold War has ended but Pine Gap is expanding and it's getting involved in conflicts across the world. We hear from someone who's been on the inside, meeting a spy who spent years working within the razor wire.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: It's season 2 and Derek still can't cook! With locally found ingredients, and a sprinkle of culture and character, Mark and Derek create an Indigenous-inspired feast for the people they visit along their journey.

programme.title: E4 - The Artist, Rose Riebl, Dr Jamin, Womad
programme.desc: Thom Monckton's The Artist struggles to find his paintbrush; pianist Rose Riebl talks Icelandic influences; we meet Hobart street artist Jamin; and inflatable dancers take over Adelaide's Botanic Gardens as part of WOMAD.

programme.title: E4 - Black Swans - Black Swans (Part 4) Countdown To Doomsday
programme.desc: During the Cold War, it was a very real fear that a nuclear winter would obliterate life as we know it. In 2026 the sense of dread has been replaced by the threat of climate change. So are we destined to feel doomed? (Part 4)

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: It's season 2 and Derek still can't cook! With locally found ingredients, and a sprinkle of culture and character, Mark and Derek create an Indigenous-inspired feast for the people they visit along their journey.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: E316
programme.desc: Gourmet celebrities team up to explore the world of convenience stores and share their secret recipes!

programme.title: E322
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E617
programme.desc: Parenting challenges of 'Superman' , the first hero that children encounter when they are born.

programme.title: E524
programme.desc: Foreigners who have left their familiar worlds behind and come to the unfamiliar land of Korea! A vivid, real-life adaptation story of foreigners trying to settle into Korean society for various reasons. This reality program warmly portrays their concerns about jobs, marriage, and parenting while living in Korea.

programme.title: E322
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. programme.title: E15 - Bites Of Fantasy

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: Braised pork knuckle is an auspicious dish served in weddings, birthday dinners, and Lunar New Years. Chef Garrison Cheng, makes a twist on classic pork knuckle by using braising and frying techniques.

programme.title: E2 - Spinach Feta Pie & Baklava
programme.desc: Drawing on his travels, Jake puts his twist on boreka hand pies, filled with tender white beans, spinach and feta. This recipe can work as a side dish or is hearty enough to be the main course.

programme.title: E14 - Give Me A Sign
programme.desc: An unassuming night out with her girlfriends yields one of the most emotional and surprising readings, as Theresa delivers messages to a skeptical woman grieving the shocking loss of her pregnant daughter.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: Nat, Gillian, Alex and Lourdes battle it out in a Pressure Test at Black Cat Truffles. They have four hours to recreate truffle farm owner – and hatted chef – Liam Downes' signature dish.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: At the first stop, Ulaan Chuluut landfill, 'Trash Uncle' Kim Seok-hoon is back in action, diving into cleanup mode. But he finds something shocking that leaves him furious. What happened at the landfill?

programme.title: E1 - Aircraft Recovery
programme.desc: Swamp Ghost is an hour long documentary covering the attempt to recover the long lost aircraft. Fred Hagen, Aircraft Historian and Recovery Expert is on mission to recover the Swamp Ghost and return it home. Fred and his team trek through crocodile and deadly insect infested swamps to recover the long lost aircraft.

programme.title: E6 - Drill vs. Super Metal
programme.desc: Episode 106 of Showdown on the Unbeatables features the Stang water blaster versus Ultra Every Dry’s water repellent coating; the Republic Lagun VGC 4428 smart drill versus HPA’s super alloy; and the Harris Hawk versus the XFactory X6 remote controlled racecar.

programme.title: E6 - Right Under Our Nose
programme.desc: Claudia and Robin scramble to find a second jade boulder before their buyer backs out of the deal, but they’re running out of time and options.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: Scientists from the University of Queensland come to the farm to practice artificial insemination techniques. Lyn tells the other students her heart-breaking secret and says she is considering a future in the crocodile industry. John reveals which two students are going to Kakadu.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: John takes Lyn and Luke to Kakadu where they raid nests and catch a four and a half metre male croc for research. Lyn returns to the place where her 11-year old granddaughter was taken by a croc and is finally at peace.

programme.title: GARY NEVILLE: PREMIER LEAGUE HALL OF FAME
GARY NEVILLE: PREMIER LEAGUE HALL OF FAME
E4 - The Lost Prince
programme.desc: When Mizumu’s status drops during adolescence, his alpha female mother disowns him. Follow his challenging journey to find a new clan while overcoming the threats of charging hippos, hungry crocodiles, a pack of wild dogs, and a hyena-eating leopard.

programme.title: E1 - Desert-Adapted Elephant
programme.desc: Trek across the Namibian desert with the bush elephant and learn how it keeps its cool in a place with little food or shade. Discover how this giant consumes specific plants, digs wells, and hikes endless dunes in a quest to find precious water.

programme.title: E2 - The Great Divide
programme.desc: Created by titanic forces and spanning 3,700 km along the eastern edge of Australia, the Great Dividing Range separates two very different worlds. Aerial footage and intimate studies reveal how species survive and thrive in this mountain home.

programme.title: E2 - Pushed to the Limits
programme.desc: Thirst for rain alongside the animals of the Kalahari, as they endure a brutally dry year. Witness co-operation between elephant herds in their desperate search for water and meet a meerkat’s strange babysitter, who helps the next generation survive.

programme.title: E2 - The Great Divide
programme.desc: Created by titanic forces and spanning 3,700 km along the eastern edge of Australia, the Great Dividing Range separates two very different worlds. Aerial footage and intimate studies reveal how species survive and thrive in this mountain home.

programme.title: E2 - Pushed to the Limits
programme.desc: Thirst for rain alongside the animals of the Kalahari, as they endure a brutally dry year. Witness co-operation between elephant herds in their desperate search for water and meet a meerkat’s strange babysitter, who helps the next generation survive.

programme.title: E6 - Here Comes the Rain
programme.desc: Welcome the rains as an emotional Julz says farewell to the dog packs. He discovers the Stork Colony pups hunting guinea fowl, and is heartened to find the Kakuli pups feeding on an antelope carcass. The playful Manzi pack corner a tough warthog.

programme.title: E4 - Ice
programme.desc: Trek to the planet’s quickly melting poles, where animals are giving scientists clues about our future existence. Learn how the movements of polar bears, penguins, and other arctic creatures could help humans map (and prevent) global warming.

programme.title: E5 - Grasslands
programme.desc: Explore one of Earth’s most vital but overlooked habitats and learn how grasslands could slow climate change by soaking up more carbon than forests do. Meet key species, such as bison and pumas, that could restore this resource and heal our planet.

programme.title: E1 - Meet the Jaguars
programme.desc: Head out into the Pantanal with Lizzie and the Onçafari team on the hunt for a missing dominant male jaguar. Monitor the battle between young hopefuls, like outsider Badalo, who want to usurp his power and win over Fera and the other local females.

programme.title: Boss Shark
programme.desc: Witness the ultimate battle for dominance as scientists try to pick out the alpha male in a pack of 100-plus great white sharks off the New Zealand coast. Marvel at the speed, hunting prowess, and fearlessness that determine the leader of the pack.

programme.desc: Trek to the planet’s quickly melting poles, where animals are giving scientists clues about our future existence. Learn how the movements of polar bears, penguins, and other arctic creatures could help humans map (and prevent) global warming.

programme.title: E5 - Grasslands
programme.desc: Explore one of Earth’s most vital but overlooked habitats and learn how grasslands could slow climate change by soaking up more carbon than forests do. Meet key species, such as bison and pumas, that could restore this resource and heal our planet.

programme.title: E4 - Ice

programme.title: E4 - The Lost Prince
programme.desc: When Mizumu’s status drops during adolescence, his alpha female mother disowns him. Follow his challenging journey to find a new clan while overcoming the threats of charging hippos, hungry crocodiles, a pack of wild dogs, and a hyena-eating leopard.

programme.title: E1 - Desert-Adapted Elephant
programme.desc: Trek across the Namibian desert with the bush elephant and learn how it keeps its cool in a place with little food or shade. Discover how this giant consumes specific plants, digs wells, and hikes endless dunes in a quest to find precious water.

programme.title: E2 - The Great Divide
programme.desc: Created by titanic forces and spanning 3,700 km along the eastern edge of Australia, the Great Dividing Range separates two very different worlds. Aerial footage and intimate studies reveal how species survive and thrive in this mountain home.

programme.title: E2 - Pushed to the Limits
programme.desc: Thirst for rain alongside the animals of the Kalahari, as they endure a brutally dry year. Witness co-operation between elephant herds in their desperate search for water and meet a meerkat’s strange babysitter, who helps the next generation survive.

programme.title: E6 - Here Comes the Rain
programme.desc: Welcome the rains as an emotional Julz says farewell to the dog packs. He discovers the Stork Colony pups hunting guinea fowl, and is heartened to find the Kakuli pups feeding on an antelope carcass. The playful Manzi pack corner a tough warthog.

programme.title: E4 - Ice

programme.title: E1 - Meet the Jaguars
programme.desc: Head out into the Pantanal with Lizzie and the Onçafari team on the hunt for a missing dominant male jaguar. Monitor the battle between young hopefuls, like outsider Badalo, who want to usurp his power and win over Fera and the other local females.

programme.title: Boss Shark
programme.desc: Witness the ultimate battle for dominance as scientists try to pick out the alpha male in a pack of 100-plus great white sharks off the New Zealand coast. Marvel at the speed, hunting prowess, and fearlessness that determine the leader of the pack.

programme.title: An Autumn's Tale
programme.desc: Lee Kay goes to college in New York City and also to visit her boyfriend Dickson. The one to meet her at the airport is a distant relative Boat Head...

programme.title: Superstars Sunday: The Island
programme.desc: The story takes place on a deserted island. The only residence on the island is a family in which the mother ruled over three of her sons: Tai Fat, gloomy and sullen; Yee Fat, vulgar and cruel; Sam Fat, slightly retarded. Mother's earnest wish is to find a wife for Sam Fat to continue the family tree. Teacher Cheung, along with six of his students arrive on the island for camping. They first meet Yee Fat who brings them to the grocery for a rest. Yee Fat is delighted with the presence of the 3 young girls while Sam Fat falls in love at first sight with the charming girl Phyllis. He expresses his feelings to Tai Fat who has sworn to his mother that he will fulfill her wish to find his youngest brother a wife. He proposes to Cheung that Phyllis be married to Sam Fat. Cheung first thinks that it's a joke, but soon senses that Tai Fat is serious and that all three brothers are actually psychologically imbalanced...

programme.title: A True Mob Story
programme.desc: Cheung Dee, together with his best friends Long Life Chuen and Holy Sand, set up a valet parking counter outside a restaurant owned by a triad society he affiliates with. By accident, Cheung finds out that the son of his triad head, Tai Tze, is fiercely attacked by Song Bo. To save Tai's life, Cheung attacks Song and not only leaves a scar on Song's face, but also puts him in jail for five years which plants a seed of the revenge five years later. Form that moment, the only person that can cheer him up is his best girl friend Ruby. Yet, Cheung has his heart on Sandy, a young solicitor who helped set him free in an assault case. No sooner has their love relationship developed than Cheung's nightmare has begun......

programme.title: Twinkle, Twinkle Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Muscles, Kidstuff, Fung, and the gang taking a well-needed vacation in Thailand courtesy of the Hong Kong police department. Also on the trip is police inspector Woo on orders to track down a list of drug dealers from informant Ma. Unfortunately, Ma gets whacked by a Thai crime lord, but he tells Woo as he draws his last breath that he mailed the list to his friend in Hong Kong. Meanwhile, Muscles and the gang are shaking down Lau, a drug dealer who, it turns out, is being targeted by the same baddies that killed Ma...

programme.desc: A Naagin seeks revenge on those who harmed loved ones, as seasons shift, balancing vengeance, love, duty, and life between human world and a realm.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Built For Billions
programme.desc: ‘Built for Billions' uncovers the blueprints behind the world's biggest tech empires-how they scale, monetize, and dominate markets. From innovative revenue models to dramatic turnarounds, each episode reveals lessons in resilience, leadership and reinvention that power profitability in the digital age.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. programme.desc: Liberland is a country that doesn't officially exist. A country that promises voluntary taxes and a lean state. It's a libertarian utopia that's finding more supporters worldwide.

programme.title: From Fruit Bats To Humans - A Virus On The Move
programme.desc: An infection with Nipah virus can quickly turn deadly. It's carried by fruit bats able to travel long distances. This time around we look at how organisms spread through migration, and how climate change affects the process.

programme.desc: Investigative reporters are always on the hunt for exclusive information. But when the secret service serves as a source, can it also exploit journalists as agents?

programme.title: E32 - Delphine Boulay Case: Terror At The Scout Camp
programme.desc: August 1988. Delphine, 9 years old, leaves with her brother for a scout camp near Deauville. Holidays that will quickly turn into a nightmare. One night, while she was supposed to be sleeping peacefully in her tent, Delphine disappeared. Her lifeless body would be found a few days later.

programme.desc: A seemingly mild-mannered realtor with a dark secret is forced to confront the choices that haunt him and the history he never truly buried.

programme.title: E10 - 付出的真心變笑話？
programme.desc: 以「尋找勢均力敵的參與者」為核心模式，通過團隊協作任務獲取生存物資，個人競技爭奪約會權，並設置淘汰機制與心動投票綁定規則；素人嘉賓們將逃離都市，直面愛情與生存的挑戰，在人群中尋找勢均力敵的彼此。

programme.title: E24 - 大連「彭于晏」來襲
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E10 - 付出的真心變笑話？
programme.desc: 以「尋找勢均力敵的參與者」為核心模式，通過團隊協作任務獲取生存物資，個人競技爭奪約會權，並設置淘汰機制與心動投票綁定規則；素人嘉賓們將逃離都市，直面愛情與生存的挑戰，在人群中尋找勢均力敵的彼此。

programme.title: E12 - 收官之旅 不說再見 (下)
programme.desc: 首檔原創音樂創演節目，邀請了薛之謙、張靚穎、周深、單依純、黃子弘凡等歌手，同時更邀請小柯、方文山、黃國倫等樂壇前輩和眾多新生代原創音樂人加盟；由歌曲爭奪戰、首演舞台兩大核心環節組成，用一場歌手與歌曲的奇遇，為他們提供一個自由共創的舞台，打造華語樂壇新的高光時刻。

programme.title: E3 - B組盲配開啟
programme.desc: 在音樂主題上再度突破，以「一路為伍，向生綻放」為主題，甄選了貼近生活的歌曲和作品，用歌聲傳遞正能量；邀請了A-Lin、大張偉、庾澄慶、馬嘉祺、光良、蘇慧玲、任賢齊、陳卓璇、曾比特、白舉綱、吳莫愁等老、中、青三代歌手，在全新升級的「盲選配對」模式中組合獻唱，在代際傳承、時代交融中突破自我，打造一場最溫暖、最動人的音樂盛宴。

programme.title: E10 - 付出的真心變笑話？
programme.desc: 以「尋找勢均力敵的參與者」為核心模式，通過團隊協作任務獲取生存物資，個人競技爭奪約會權，並設置淘汰機制與心動投票綁定規則；素人嘉賓們將逃離都市，直面愛情與生存的挑戰，在人群中尋找勢均力敵的彼此。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 只有最頂層的0.1%人口可住在天空城堡——一個獨特的住宅社區。在上流社會的「SKY Castle」中更住著一群欲扶助丈夫事業和培育子女成為二代貴族的貴婦。然而，這些貴婦都有一個秘密不能告訴任何人。她們的財富、榮譽和最重要的權力鬥爭從現在開始！

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Khuddar
programme.desc: Shastri has two sons, Siddhant and Nandu. Siddhant is an honest son and Nandu falls into bad company. Siddhant has to choose to be corrupt or be honest. Release Year: 1994 Director: Iqbal Durrani

programme.title: Shor Se Shuruaat
programme.desc: An anthology of seven short films that revolve around the theme of noise and depict real-life issues. Release Year: 2016 Director: Amira Bhargava, Rahul V. Chittella, Satish Raj Kasireddi

programme.title: Hum Do Humare Do
programme.desc: An orphan man's life takes a hilarious turn when he decides to hire a duo, who share a past, to fake being his parents in an attempt to fulfil his lover's wish of marrying someone with a family. Release Year: 2021 Director: Abhishek Jain

programme.title: Komada - A Whisky Family
programme.desc: Kotaro, a novice editor for a web news, visits Komada Distillery for a project on Japanese craft whisky. Led by a young female president Rui who recently took over the family business, the distillery works hard to reproduce its signature whisky KOMA they had to stop making years ago. KOMA was a brand that Rui's family had lovingly preserved over generations and a symbol of happiness for all. However, not to mention financial backing, too many clues are missing to revive the whisky once lost. Rui, Kotaro, and the distillery supporters pull together every thread to bring back the whisky filled with family memories.

programme.title: Movie Craftsmen -Cheung Siu Fai
programme.desc: Cheung Siu Fai, who started his career in television, won the appreciation of director Johnnie To with his precise and solid performance and participated in hit films such as “Running On Karma”, “Election” and “Exiled”. In this episode, Siu Fai is invited to disassemble the design of his classic characters, talk about his friend-and-mentor-like relationship with Johnnie To and share his steadily progressing acting career.

programme.title: Emergency Declaration
programme.desc: Veteran chief police detective In-ho (SONG Kang-ho) receives a tip about a man threatening a terrorist attack against a plane. While investigating, he discovers that the suspect has actually boarded flight no. KI501. Despite his phobia of flying, Jae-hyuk (LEE Byung-hun) decides to go to Hawaii for the sake for his daughter's health. At the airport, he is distracted by a strange man who hangs around, speaking to them in a menacing way. Flight no. KI501 departs Incheon Airport for Hawaii, but soon afterwards a man dies for mysterious reasons. Fear and chaos spread quickly, not only inside the plane, but also on land. Hearing this news, Transport Minister Sook-hee (JEON Do-yeon) sets up a counterterrorism task force and calls an emergency meeting in order to find a way to land the airplane.

programme.title: Movie Craftsmen -Cheung Siu Fai
